'''Seraphan Industries''' was a company active during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The company's president, [[Illyan Webble]] was eventually involved in an incident where his [[Yacht/Legends|space yacht]] was disabled and he was captured by [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]].
